scripts.deploy:local: npx cross-env HARDHAT_IGNITION_CONFIRM_DEPLOYMENT=true hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/App.ts --network localhost && node scripts/export-abis.cjs
scripts.deploy:sepolia: npx cross-env HARDHAT_NETWORK=sepolia npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.ts --network sepolia && node scripts/export-abis.cjs
scripts.deploy:mainnet: npx cross-env HARDHAT_NETWORK=mainnet npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.ts --network mainnet && node scripts/export-abis.cjs
scripts.deploy:sepolia:gasless: npx cross-env HARDHAT_NETWORK=sepolia npx hardhat run scripts/deploy-gasless.ts --network sepolia && node scripts/export-abis.cjs
scripts.seed:sepolia: npx cross-env HARDHAT_NETWORK=sepolia hardhat run scripts/seed-data.ts --network sepolia
